name: xiaokcode
description: 本地优先的 AI 任务交付工作台 CLI

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const t=new Date();const s=t.getFullYear()+'-'+String(t.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')+'-'+String(t.getDate()).padStart(2,'0')+' '+String(t.getHours()).padStart(2,'0')+':'+String(t.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0');fs.writeFileSync('src/build-info.ts','export const BUILD_TIME: string | null = '+JSON.stringify(s)+';\n')" && tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(process.platform!=='win32' && fs.existsSync('dist/index.js')) fs.chmodSync('dist/index.js', 0o755)"
scripts.build:release: node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('src/build-info.ts','export const BUILD_TIME: string | null = null;\n')" && tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(process.platform!=='win32' && fs.existsSync('dist/index.js')) fs.chmodSync('dist/index.js', 0o755)"
scripts.test:sandbox:build: tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); fs.mkdirSync('.test-dist',{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync('.test-dist/package.json', JSON.stringify({version:pkg.version,type:'module'}, null, 2));"
scripts.test:sandbox: npm run test:sandbox:build && npm run test:sandbox:run && npm run eval:intent-delegation && npm run eval:skill-quality && npm run eval:skill-adherence
scripts.test:local: npm run test:sandbox:build && npm run test:sandbox:run:cached
scripts.test:fast: npm run test:sandbox:build && npm run test:sandbox:run:cached
scripts.test:skill:fast: npm run test:sandbox:build && npm run test:sandbox:run -- .test-dist/tests/ai/skills/loader.test.js .test-dist/tests/ai/skills/quality.test.js .test-dist/tests/ai/skills/tool.test.js .test-dist/tests/ai/skills/compliance.test.js .test-dist/tests/ai/skills/watcher.test.js .test-dist/tests/ai/tools/index.test.js .test-dist/tests/ai/tools/subagent.test.js .test-dist/tests/ai/runtime/session-store.test.js .test-dist/tests/runtime/skills/adherence-store.test.js && npm run eval:skill-quality && npm run eval:skill-adherence
scripts.test:skill:release: npm run test:skill:fast && npm run test:skill:release:run && npm run eval:skill-adherence:release
scripts.test:gate:fast: npm run build && npm run test:sandbox:build && npm run test:sandbox:run -- .test-dist/tests/ai/intent-delegation/planner.test.js .test-dist/tests/runtime/intent-delegation/skill-eval-store.test.js .test-dist/tests/runtime/intent-delegation/skill-score-store.test.js .test-dist/tests/ui/orchestration.test.js .test-dist/tests/commands/chat.test.js .test-dist/tests/quality/artifact-smoke.test.js .test-dist/tests/quality/regression-capture.test.js && npm run eval:skill-quality && npm run eval:skill-adherence
scripts.test:gate:slow: npm run test:gate:fast && npm run test:sandbox:run -- .test-dist/tests/runtime/intent-delegation/runtime-sync.test.js .test-dist/tests/runtime/intent-delegation/skill-eval-sync.test.js .test-dist/tests/commands/chat-interactive-runtime.test.js .test-dist/tests/commands/chat-workflow-wiring.test.js .test-dist/tests/ai/runtime/session-store.test.js && npm run eval:intent-behavior
